title: Quality Assurance | Psychology Direct
description: Every report is quality-checked before delivery. All experts are HCPC/GMC registered and DBS checked.
keywords: quality assurance expert witness and educational reports

blocks.headline: 100% Report Quality Assurance. Every Time.
blocks.subtitle: Every report is proofread, checked for accuracy, and verified against court standards. All experts are registered, DBS checked, and insured. Quality isn't negotiable.

steps.title: Expert Vetting
steps.description: All psychologists are HCPC registered. All psychiatrists are GMC registered. All have enhanced DBS checks and professional indemnity insurance. We review sample reports before accepting anyone.

steps.title: Detailed Instruction
steps.description: Your Client Manager takes a detailed brief. Your requirements. Timelines. Budget. Special circumstances. The expert gets a thorough brief.

steps.title: Expert Delivers Assessment
steps.description: The expert conducts the assessment to best practice standards and your instructions.

steps.title: Report QA Check
steps.description: 100% proofreading: grammar, clarity, legal compliance. We verify all your questions are answered. Recommendations are clear. Report is court-ready.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.description: Report is delivered securely, on time, ready to file. Your Client Manager is available if you have questions.

rows.col1: Thorough verification: HCPC/GMC/DBS/Insurance. Sample reports reviewed.
rows.col2: You verify independently. Risk of missed credentials.

rows.col1: Dedicated Client Manager ensures expert fully understands your requirements.
rows.col2: You brief the expert directly. Risk of miscommunication.

rows.col1: 100% proofread and accuracy-checked. All instructions verified as addressed.
rows.col2: No independent quality check. You rely on expert's standard.

rows.col1: We verify reports meet court standards, CPR, and legal requirements.
rows.col2: You review for compliance. Extra work for you.

rows.col1: Expert unavailable? Assessment needs rescheduling? We step in and resolve.
rows.col2: You manage all logistics and issues yourself.

rows.col1: Same or less than direct instruction. We handle admin you'd otherwise do.
rows.col2: Direct instruction fees, plus your admin time.

rows.col1: Guaranteed payment, insured, professional indemnity cover.

faqs.question: What happens if a report doesn't meet your QA standards?
faqs.answer: It goes back to the expert for revision before we send it. You never receive a substandard report. We give the expert feedback to help them improve. This is rare (less than 5% of reports). It's built in to protect you.

faqs.question: Are all your experts HCPC or GMC registered?
faqs.answer: Yes, 100%. All psychologists are HCPC registered with BPS. All psychiatrists are GMC registered and Section 12 approved. We verify before onboarding and check ongoing.

faqs.question: What if an expert becomes unavailable mid-case?
faqs.answer: Your Client Manager steps in immediately. We match you with an alternative expert. We have 1,000+ professionals. We almost always find a replacement quickly. You're never left without support.

faqs.question: How do you ensure reports meet court requirements?
faqs.answer: Our QA team includes legal and court professionals. We check every report against court standards and CPR requirements. We verify that expert opinion is evidence-based, recommendations are actionable, and presentation is clear.

faqs.question: What is professional indemnity insurance and why does it matter?
faqs.answer: It protects you and the expert if a claim arises about the assessment or report. All our experts carry this insurance. It's a crucial safety net in legal cases.

faqs.question: Can I request a specific expert?
faqs.answer: Yes. If you've worked with an expert before, tell us. We'll match them if available. We also consider location, specialism, and personality fit.

faqs.question: How long does the QA check take?
faqs.answer: QA review typically takes 3-5 days. This is built into our 4-6 week standard turnaround. For urgent cases, we have a fast-track process.

blocks.heading: Need a Court-Ready Expert Report?
blocks.bodyText: Our QA process guarantees a court-ready report that answers your instructions. Delivered on time. Zero surprises.
